title: Provider and Tool Errors, Retry Eligibility, Idempotency, Compensation, and Stop · Program Brief: Backoff Rate Budget
summary: Every exception receives exponential retry, rate-limit guidance is ignored, write tools repeat after timeouts, compensation is untested, and terminal failures become generic apologies. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the backoff rate budget increment in typed idempotent agent recovery policy. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
objectives: Apply bounded delay, Retry-After, jitter, global and per-resource concurrency, rate, token, and spend budgets without retry storms.
Retry only idempotent or protected operations when policy, deadline, budget, status, provider guidance, and attempt evidence permit.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example agent engineering team handles case 2110 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to classify provider and tool failures, retry only safe cases with bounded backoff, preserve idempotency, compensate, and stop visibly; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. A defensible solution applies Backoff Rate Budget, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to typed idempotent agent recovery policy.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-errors-retries-idempotency-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-errors-retries-idempotency-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_errors_retries_idempotency_4(failures: int = 18, retryable_failures: int = 8, terminal_failures: int = 10, successful_retries: int = 7, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if failures < 1 or retryable_failures < 0 or terminal_failures < 0:
        return False, failures, "failure-count"
    if retryable_failures + terminal_failures != failures:
        return False, retryable_failures, "failure-classification"
    if successful_retries < 0 or successful_retries > retryable_failures:
        return False, successful_retries, "retry-evidence"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "retry-duplicate-effect"
    assert retryable_failures + terminal_failures == failures and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, successful_retries, "idempotent-agent-recovery"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Build Backoff Rate Budget evidence · Theory Backoff Rate Budget
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-backoff-rate-budget-16msfq" that uses case 9619 to classify provider and tool failures, retry only safe cases with bounded backoff, preserve idempotency, compensate, and stop visibly. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-backoff-rate-budget-16msfq
# Competency: agentpy-backoff-rate-budget.
# Case 9619: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_backoff_rate_budget_16msfq(failures: int = 18, retryable_failures: int = 8, terminal_failures: int = 10, successful_retries: int = 7, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_16msfq = "16msfq-qfsm61-9619"
    assert evidence_variant_16msfq
    evidence_axes_16msfq = (
        "authority16msfq",
        "interaction9619",
        "toolqfsm61",
        "state16msfq9619",
        "evaluation961916msfq",
        "recoveryqfsm619619",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_16msfq)) == 6
    if failures < 1 or retryable_failures < 0 or terminal_failures < 0:
        return False, failures, "failure-count"
    if retryable_failures + terminal_failures != failures:
        return False, retryable_failures, "failure-classification"
    if successful_retries < 0 or successful_retries > retryable_failures:
        return False, successful_retries, "retry-evidence"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "retry-duplicate-effect"
    assert retryable_failures + terminal_failures == failures and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, successful_retries, "idempotent-agent-recovery"
